languages.text:
Depending on the current Glaito's mode, Solomorne receives a corresponding type of bonus at the start of his turn:
- {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}Apprehending{/g}: +{uip|DamageBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% Damage
- {g|f:a63088cd6402424b8ec0c508e5143083}Protecting{/g}: +{uip|ArmorBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% Armor
- {g|f:11251c47c7b14a87824cffe48ea6374d}Roaming{/g}: +2 MP
This effect is active only if Solomorne sees Glaito!

traits.locale_text:
Depending on the current Glaito's mode, Solomorne receives a corresponding type of bonus at the start of his turn:
- {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}Apprehending{/g}: +{uip|DamageBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% Damage
- {g|f:a63088cd6402424b8ec0c508e5143083}Protecting{/g}: +{uip|ArmorBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% Armor
- {g|f:11251c47c7b14a87824cffe48ea6374d}Roaming{/g}: +2 MP
This effect is active only if Solomorne sees Glaito!

languages.text:
If the cyber-mastiff is:
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}apprehending{/g}, Solomorne's damage dealt is increased by +{uip|DamageBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:a63088cd6402424b8ec0c508e5143083}protecting{/g}, Solomorne's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} is increased by +{uip|ArmorBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% at the start of his turn.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...is in {g|f:11251c47c7b14a87824cffe48ea6374d}Battle Mode: Standby{/g}, Solomorne gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} at the start of his turn.</indent>
This effect is active only if Solomorne has the cyber-mastiff in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}.

-<indent=5%>...{g|f:a63088cd6402424b8ec0c508e5143083}protecting{/g}, Solomorne's armour is increased by +{uip|ArmorBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% at the start of his turn.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:11251c47c7b14a87824cffe48ea6374d}roaming{/g}, Solomorne gains +2 MP at the start of his turn.</indent>
This effect is active only if Solomorne has the cyber-mastiff in his line of sight.

If the cyber-mastiff is:
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}apprehending{/g}, Solomorne's damage dealt is increased by +{uip|DamageBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:a63088cd6402424b8ec0c508e5143083}protecting{/g}, Solomorne's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} is increased by +{uip|ArmorBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% at the start of his turn.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:11251c47c7b14a87824cffe48ea6374d}roaming{/g}, Solomorne gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} at the start of his turn.</indent>
This effect is active only if Solomorne has the cyber-mastiff in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}.

If the cyber-mastiff is:
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}apprehending{/g}, Solomorne's damage dealt is increased by +{uip|DamageBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% at the start of his turn.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:a63088cd6402424b8ec0c508e5143083}protecting{/g}, Solomorne's armour is increased by +{uip|ArmorBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% at the start of his turn.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:11251c47c7b14a87824cffe48ea6374d}roaming{/g}, Solomorne gains +2 MP at the start of his turn.</indent>
This effect is active only if Solomorne has the cyber-mastiff in his line of sight.

If the cyber-mastiff is:
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}apprehending{/g}, Solomorne's damage dealt is increased by +{uip|DamageBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:a63088cd6402424b8ec0c508e5143083}protecting{/g}, Solomorne's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} is increased by +{uip|ArmorBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% at the start of his turn.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:11251c47c7b14a87824cffe48ea6374d}roaming{/g}, Solomorne gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} at the start of his turn.</indent>
This effect is active only if Solomorne has the cyber-mastiff in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}.

languages.text:
Если кибермастиф:
-<indent=5%>...выполняет {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}захват{/g}, наносимый Соломоном урон увеличивается на +{uip|DamageBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% в начале его {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:a63088cd6402424b8ec0c508e5143083}охраняет{/g} союзника, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}броня{/g} Соломона увеличивается на +{uip|ArmorBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}%в начале его хода.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:11251c47c7b14a87824cffe48ea6374d}в автономном режиме{/g}, Соломон получает +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}ОП{/g} в начале своего хода.</indent>
Этот эффект действует только если кибермастиф находится в {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}зоне видимости{/g} Соломона.

If the cyber-mastiff is:

This effect is active only if Solomorne has the cyber-mastiff in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Если кибермастиф:
-<indent=5%>...выполняет {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}захват{/g}, в начале {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} Соломона наносимый им урон увеличивается на +{uip|DamageBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}%.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:a63088cd6402424b8ec0c508e5143083}охраняет{/g} союзника, в начале хода Соломона его {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}броня{/g} увеличивается на +{uip|ArmorBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}%.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:11251c47c7b14a87824cffe48ea6374d}в автономном режиме{/g}, Соломон получает +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}ОП{/g} в начале своего хода.</indent>
Этот эффект действует только если кибермастиф находится в {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}зоне видимости{/g} Соломона.

Если кибермастиф:
-<indent=5%>...выполняет {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}захват{/g}, в начале {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} Соломона наносимый им урон увеличивается на +{uip|DamageBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}%.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:a63088cd6402424b8ec0c508e5143083}охраняет{/g} союзника, в начале хода Соломона его {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}броня{/g} увеличивается на +{uip|ArmorBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}%.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:11251c47c7b14a87824cffe48ea6374d}в автономном режиме{/g}, Соломон получает +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}ОП{/g} в начале своего хода.</indent>
Этот эффект действует только если кибермастиф находится в {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}зоне видимости{/g} Соломона.

languages.text:
Wenn der Cyber-Mastiff:
-<indent=5%>... einen Gegner {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}stellt{/g}, erhöht sich Solomornes Schaden zu Beginn seines {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} um +{uip|DamageBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba} %.</indent>
-<indent=5%>... {g|f:a63088cd6402424b8ec0c508e5143083}schützt{/g}, erhöht sich Solomornes {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Rüstung{/g} zu Beginn seines Zuges um +{uip|ArmorBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba} %.</indent>
-<indent=5%>... {g|f:11251c47c7b14a87824cffe48ea6374d}streunt{/g}, erhält Solomorne zu Beginn seines Zuges +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}BP{/g}.</indent>
Dieser Effekt ist nur aktiv, wenn sich der Cyber-Mastiff in Solomornes {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}Sichtlinie{/g} aufhält.
languages.original_text:
If the cyber-mastiff is:
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}apprehending{/g}, Solomorne's damage dealt is increased by +{uip|DamageBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:a63088cd6402424b8ec0c508e5143083}protecting{/g}, Solomorne's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} is increased by +{uip|ArmorBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% at the start of his turn.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:11251c47c7b14a87824cffe48ea6374d}roaming{/g}, Solomorne gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} at the start of his turn.</indent>
This effect is active only if Solomorne has the cyber-mastiff in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Wenn der Cyber-Mastiff:
-<indent=5%>... einen Gegner {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}stellt{/g}, erhöht sich Solomornes Schaden zu Beginn seines {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} um +{uip|DamageBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba} %.</indent>
-<indent=5%>... {g|f:a63088cd6402424b8ec0c508e5143083}schützt{/g}, erhöht sich Solomornes {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Rüstung{/g} zu Beginn seines Zuges um +{uip|ArmorBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba} %.</indent>
-<indent=5%>... {g|f:11251c47c7b14a87824cffe48ea6374d}streunt{/g}, erhält Solomorne zu Beginn seines Zuges +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}BP{/g}.</indent>
Dieser Effekt ist nur aktiv, wenn sich der Cyber-Mastiff in Solomornes {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}Sichtlinie{/g} aufhält.

languages.text:
Si le cyber-mastiff :
-<indent=5%>... est en mode {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}Appréhension{/g}, les dégâts infligés par son maître augmentent de +{uip|DamageBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba} % au début de son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>... est en mode {g|f:a63088cd6402424b8ec0c508e5143083}Protection{/g}, l'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Armure{/g} de son maître augmente de +{uip|ArmorBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba} % au début de son tour.</indent>
-<indent=5%>... est en {g|f:11251c47c7b14a87824cffe48ea6374d}Maraude{/g}, son maître gagne +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PD{/g} au début de son tour.</indent>
Cet effet est actif uniquement si le cyber-mastiff se trouve dans la {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}ligne de mire{/g} de Solomorne.
languages.original_text:
If the cyber-mastiff is:
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}apprehending{/g}, Solomorne's damage dealt is increased by +{uip|DamageBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:a63088cd6402424b8ec0c508e5143083}protecting{/g}, Solomorne's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} is increased by +{uip|ArmorBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% at the start of his turn.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:11251c47c7b14a87824cffe48ea6374d}roaming{/g}, Solomorne gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} at the start of his turn.</indent>
This effect is active only if Solomorne has the cyber-mastiff in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Si le cyber-mastiff :
-<indent=5%>... est en mode {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}Appréhension{/g}, les dégâts infligés par son maître augmentent de +{uip|DamageBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba} % au début de son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>... est en mode {g|f:a63088cd6402424b8ec0c508e5143083}Protection{/g}, l'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Armure{/g} de son maître augmente de +{uip|ArmorBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba} % au début de son tour.</indent>
-<indent=5%>... est en {g|f:11251c47c7b14a87824cffe48ea6374d}Maraude{/g}, son maître gagne +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PD{/g} au début de son tour.</indent>
Cet effet est actif uniquement si le cyber-mastiff se trouve dans la {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}ligne de mire{/g} de Solomorne.

languages.text:
若生化獒犬处于：
- <indent=5%>{g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}实施逮捕{/g}状态，索罗蒙造成的伤害在其{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始时提高{uip|DamageBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}%。</indent>
- <indent=5%>{g|f:a63088cd6402424b8ec0c508e5143083}实施守护{/g}状态，索罗蒙的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}护甲{/g}在其回合开始时增加{uip|ArmorBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}%。</indent>
- <indent=5%>{g|f:11251c47c7b14a87824cffe48ea6374d}游走{/g}状态，索罗蒙在其回合开始时获得2点{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}移动点数{/g}。</indent>
此效果仅当生化獒犬位于索罗蒙{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}视线{/g}内时生效。
languages.original_text:
If the cyber-mastiff is:
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}apprehending{/g}, Solomorne's damage dealt is increased by +{uip|DamageBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.</indent>

languages.text:
Si el cibermastín está:
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}apresando{/g}, el daño infligido por Solomorne aumenta un +{uip|DamageBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba} % al comienzo de su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:a63088cd6402424b8ec0c508e5143083}protegiendo{/g}, la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armadura{/g} de Solomorne aumenta un +{uip|ArmorBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba} % al comienzo de su turno.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:11251c47c7b14a87824cffe48ea6374d}deambulando{/g}, Solomorne gana +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PM{/g} al comienzo de su turno.</indent>
Este efecto solo permanece activo si el cibermastín de Solomorne está dentro de su {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}línea de visión{/g}.

Este efecto solo permanece activo si el cibermastín de Solomorne está dentro de su {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}línea de visión{/g}.

languages.text:
サイバー・マスティフが
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}逮捕中{/g}, 彼の{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターンの開始時に、Solomorne の与えるダメージが +{uip|DamageBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}%増加する{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:a63088cd6402424b8ec0c508e5143083}protecting{/g}, Solomorne の{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} はターン開始時に +{uip|ArmorBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% 増加する。</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:11251c47c7b14a87824cffe48ea6374d}歩き回る{/g}, Solomorne はターン開始時に+2{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} を得る。</indent>
この効果はSolomorneの視線の先にサイ バー・マスティフがいる場合にのみ有効である{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}{/g} 。
languages.original_text:
If the cyber-mastiff is:
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}apprehending{/g}, Solomorne's damage dealt is increased by +{uip|DamageBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:a63088cd6402424b8ec0c508e5143083}protecting{/g}, Solomorne's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} is increased by +{uip|ArmorBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% at the start of his turn.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:11251c47c7b14a87824cffe48ea6374d}roaming{/g}, Solomorne gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} at the start of his turn.</indent>
This effect is active only if Solomorne has the cyber-mastiff in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}.

languages.text:
Siber mastif:
-<indent=5%>{g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}göz hapsine aldıysa{/g} Solomorne'un verdiği hasar, Solomorne'un {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} başında +%{uip|DamageBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba} artar.</indent>
-<indent=5%>{g|f:a63088cd6402424b8ec0c508e5143083}koruyorsa{/g} Solomorne'un {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}zırh{/g} değeri, turunun başında +%{uip|ArmorBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba} artar.</indent>
-<indent=5%>...{g|f:11251c47c7b14a87824cffe48ea6374d}Savaş Modu: Otonom{/g} hâlindeyse Solomorne, turunun başında +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}HP{/g} kazanır.</indent>
Bu etki yalnızca siber mastif, Solomorne'un {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}görüş hattı{/g} içindeyse aktiftir.

-<indent=5%>...{g|f:a63088cd6402424b8ec0c508e5143083}protecting{/g}, Solomorne's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} is increased by +{uip|ArmorBonus|38f5e9e8ab2f43b8aa356dbc89b821ba}% at the start of his turn.</indent>

This effect is active only if Solomorne has the cyber-mastiff in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}.
